---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new check, reference, or plugin
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Brief description of the new capability (e.g. new detection step, new reference doc, new plugin).

## Motivation

Why would this be useful? (e.g. "Covers X vulnerability class not yet in the skills" or "Clarifies Y for auditors.")

## Proposed change

- **Type:** New plugin / New reference / Extension to existing skill / Other
- **Content outline:** Bullet points or short description of what would be added or changed.

## References (optional)

Links to standards, audits, or research that support the proposal.
